IApiServerConfig Interface

One Identity Manager API Server

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Config
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public interface IApiServerConfig : IDisposable

The IApiServerConfig type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
BaseUrl
ImxModulesDirectoryName
ImxWebDirectoryName
IsForHosting
Returns a flag indicating whether the environment supports hosting an API server. For scenarios involving only compilation and validation, this flag is false.
IsStandAlone
Returns a value indicating if this server is running as a stand-alone installation.
WebCachePath
Top
Methods
  NameDescription
AddServiceConnectionHook
Registers an action to be called on every creation of a new service connection.
Connect
GetAppDataPath
GetAppServerServiceConnectionAsync
GetConfigDataAsync
GetConnectionString
GetServiceConnectionAsync(CancellationToken)
GetServiceConnectionAsync(Boolean, CancellationToken)
Restart
Triggers a restart of the API Server in a way that reinitializes the API.
Top
Events
  NameDescription
Disposing
Called when the server environment is shutting down.
PreparingShutdown
Called when the server enters the PrepareUnavailable state, or when the server is being disposed. This event is only invoked once.
Top
